output.summary: Chunked eval-then-train causal TTT on validation with Int5-all 11-layer model, EMA, and exclusive self-attention to stay under 16MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Applies causal test-time training by adapting parameters on each validation chunk after scoring it.
techniques: Chunked causal TTT: evaluate a chunk then train to keep compliance
Int5-All quantization plus EMA for compact model averaging
Exclusive self-attention in final layers for quality boost
